form.formComment: Third-up today. Comes off a 38 day let-up. First-up favourite; won by 2.5 len at this track February 2 over 1400m defeating Bloodline carrying 56kg at $2.80. Second-up held ground to the line 2nd of 9 at this track on March 3 over 1400m, 1.5 len behind Bloodline carrying 56kg at $1.20. Should be near his top.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 57-day let-up. First-up after six months raced behind the speed prior to fading 7th of 14 at Funabashi on February 12 over 1600m, 8 len behind Clarity carrying 54kg at $37.70. Previously second-up ran last of 11 at Urawa on August 20 over 1400m, 49 len behind Dynato Selene with 54kg at $7. Needs to do a lot more.

form.formComment: Resumes after a break of five months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation third of 11 at Morioka Dirt November 10 over 1400m, 2.5 len behind Gold Cross carrying 54kg at $4.20. When resuming last campaign seventh of 12 at Urawa October 24 2024 over 1500m, 4.5 len behind Force Children with 54kg at $59.30. Best form gives her a decent chance.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Resuming favourite; came from midfield and scored a big 4 len win at Urawa February 28 over 1500m defeating Shigerutsukimizake with 56kg at $21.80.
